'''鈭歯-th-l''' ('''nathala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tidivate|tidivate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tidivate|tidivate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-th-l
|-
! Lemma
| nathala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nathalithi|nathalithi]] || [[word:nathaliji|nathaliji]] || [[word:nathalishi|nathalishi]] || [[word:nathali|nathali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nathaluthuth|nathaluthuth]] || [[word:nathalujuj|nathalujuj]] || [[word:nathalushush|nathalushush]] || [[word:nathal|nathal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nathaluthu|nathaluthu]] || [[word:nathaluju|nathaluju]] || [[word:nathalushu|nathalushu]] || [[word:nathalu|nathalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nathalufuth|nathalufuth]] || [[word:nathalufuj|nathalufuj]] || [[word:nathalufush|nathalufush]] || [[word:nathaluf|nathaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nathalethe|nathalethe]] || [[word:nathaleje|nathaleje]] || [[word:nathaleshe|nathaleshe]] || [[word:nathale|nathale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nathalothoth|nathalothoth]] || [[word:nathalojoj|nathalojoj]] || [[word:nathaloshosh|nathaloshosh]] || [[word:nathal|nathal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nathalotho|nathalotho]] || [[word:nathalojo|nathalojo]] || [[word:nathalosho|nathalosho]] || [[word:nathalo|nathalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nathalofoth|nathalofoth]] || [[word:nathalofoj|nathalofoj]] || [[word:nathalofosh|nathalofosh]] || [[word:nathalof|nathalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nathal忙th忙|nathal忙th忙]] || [[word:nathal忙j忙|nathal忙j忙]] || [[word:nathal忙sh忙|nathal忙sh忙]] || [[word:nathal忙|nathal忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nathalathath|nathalathath]] || [[word:nathalajaj|nathalajaj]] || [[word:nathalashash|nathalashash]] || [[word:nathal|nathal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nathalatha|nathalatha]] || [[word:nathalaja|nathalaja]] || [[word:nathalasha|nathalasha]] || [[word:nathala|nathala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nathalafath|nathalafath]] || [[word:nathalafaj|nathalafaj]] || [[word:nathalafash|nathalafash]] || [[word:nathalaf|nathalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nathalasha|nathalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonathalasha|gonathalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinathalasha|gokinathalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nathaln眉sha|nathaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonathalnkn眉sha|gonathalnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinathaln眉sha|gokinathaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nathalsh毛sha|nathalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonathalnksh毛sha|gonathalnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinathalsh毛sha|gokinathalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nathalrosha|nathalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonathalnkrosha|gonathalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinathalrosha|gokinathalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nathalmusha|nathalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonathalnkmusha|gonathalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinathalmusha|gokinathalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nathalsherasha|nathalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonathalnksherasha|gonathalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinathalsherasha|gokinathalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nathalngasha|nathalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonathalnkngasha|gonathalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinathalngasha|gokinathalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nathalyasha|nathalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonathalnkyasha|gonathalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinathalyasha|gokinathalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nathalyamasha|nathalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonathalnkyamasha|gonathalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinathalyamasha|gokinathalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nathaln眉sh毛sha|nathaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonathalnkn眉sh毛sha|gonathalnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinathaln眉sh毛sha|gokinathaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nathaln眉rosha|nathaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonathalnkn眉rosha|gonathalnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinathaln眉rosha|gokinathaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nathaln眉musha|nathaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonathalnkn眉musha|gonathalnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinathaln眉musha|gokinathaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nathalsh毛n眉sha|nathalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonathalnksh毛n眉sha|gonathalnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinathalsh毛n眉sha|gokinathalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nathalsh毛rosha|nathalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonathalnksh毛rosha|gonathalnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinathalsh毛rosha|gokinathalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nathalsh毛musha|nathalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonathalnksh毛musha|gonathalnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinathalsh毛musha|gokinathalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nathalron眉sha|nathalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonathalnkron眉sha|gonathalnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinathalron眉sha|gokinathalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nathalrosh毛sha|nathalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonathalnkrosh毛sha|gonathalnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinathalrosh毛sha|gokinathalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nathalromusha|nathalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonathalnkromusha|gonathalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinathalromusha|gokinathalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nathalmun眉sha|nathalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonathalnkmun眉sha|gonathalnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinathalmun眉sha|gokinathalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nathalmush毛sha|nathalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonathalnkmush毛sha|gonathalnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinathalmush毛sha|gokinathalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nathalmurosha|nathalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonathalnkmurosha|gonathalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinathalmurosha|gokinathalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nathal|nathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n忙th忙l|n忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honathal|honathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hon忙th忙l|hon忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonathal|hohonathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohon忙th忙l|hohon忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉nathal|n眉nathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉n忙th忙l|n眉n忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉nathal|n眉n眉nathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉n忙th忙l|n眉n眉n忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂nathal|n茂nathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂n忙th忙l|n茂n忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂nathal|n茂n茂nathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂n忙th忙l|n茂n茂n忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunathal|lunathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lun忙th忙l|lun忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunathal|lulunathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulun忙th忙l|lulun忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linathal|linathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lin忙th忙l|lin忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinathal|lilinathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilin忙th忙l|lilin忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konathal|konathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kon忙th忙l|kon忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonathal|kokonathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokon忙th忙l|kokon忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenathal|kenathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ken忙th忙l|ken忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenathal|kekenathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keken忙th忙l|keken忙th忙l]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
